name: Configure SEB Browser Security Restrictions
description: Configure the browser security settings for the 'LPN Certification Practice Exam' configuration on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin). If the configuration does not exist, create it with that exact name. Update the settings to use Fullscreen browser view mode, disable the browser window toolbar, disable browsing back/forward, and disable the reload button. Set the Start URL to https://lms.nursingcollege.edu/mod/quiz/attempt.php. Additionally, enable the option for users to quit SEB and set the quit/unlock password to NurseExam2024!. Save the configuration changes.
